About Me
With 3 years of experience as a Product Specialist, I am now transitioning to freelance data entry. In my previous role, beyond product promotion, I handled data administration to support marketing activities — including data entry and analysis using Microsoft Excel.

I also helped my sister manage her small business by calculating the cost of goods sold (COGS) using Microsoft Excel, and creating product placement and consignment proposals for coffee shops.

Work Portfolio
01 Sales Data Management
National Selling-Out Data — Raw Entry
Entered and managed national selling-out data across multiple branches. Each row captures transaction details including region codes, product codes, sales rep names, customer addresses, and unit quantities. Data spans hundreds of records organized across multiple sheet tabs (PIVOT, GP INCENTIVE, RD, PM, SWASTA NASIONAL).
ExcelData EntryMulti-sheet
02 Pivot Table Analysis
Semarang Branch — Product Performance Pivot Table
Built a Pivot Table to summarize Semarang branch selling-out data, classified by principal and product name. Columns display monthly sales figures (Jan–Jun 2023) with a Grand Total column. Filters allow slicing by sales rep name, group, GP incentive, and SBS category — enabling quick performance comparisons across product lines.
ExcelPivot TableProduct Classification
03 Performance Reporting
Sales Performance vs Budget — IFERROR Formula
Created a detailed monthly performance report comparing actual sales against budget targets, with YTD (Year-to-Date) totals and year-over-year growth (GW %). Used the IFERROR formula to handle division-by-zero cases when budget values are missing, ensuring clean percentage outputs. Data is organized by SBS category, principal, and product name.
ExcelIFERRORBudget vs ActualYTD Reporting
04 Data Visualization
Monthly Sales Trend Chart
Created a multi-line chart comparing Sales 2022, Budget 2023, and Sales 2023 across all 12 months, with growth rate (GW%) highlighted in green for positive and red for negative months. Values were converted from millions to thousands of rupiah using simple division formulas to improve readability. The chart includes a full data table below for reference.
ExcelLine ChartTrend AnalysisData Table
05 Data Analysis
Root Cause Analysis — Sales Performance
Analyzed underperforming sales data to identify root causes — including stock issues, pending purchase orders, and ongoing product evaluations at hospitals. Documented findings in a structured Excel sheet covering: Problem Identification, Root Cause, Implication, Corrective Actions, and Preventive Actions — each with assigned PIC and due dates.
ExcelRoot Cause AnalysisAction Planning
06 Presentation Design
Monthly Branch Review — PowerPoint Presentation
Compiled a 15-slide PowerPoint presentation for the June monthly branch review of Semarang. Slides include: overview metrics, sales trends, MTD & YTD achievements by SBS, team performance (GS & NS), PICAPA analysis, outlet recap, local and national hospital focus, new outlet data, and team summary — all built from data processed in Excel.
PowerPointExcelMonthly Review15 Slides
07 Cost Calculation
COGS Calculation — Bakery Business (VLOOKUP)
Built a two-sheet Excel system for a small bakery business. The master sheet contains a coded raw material database organized by category (flour, sugar, chocolate, cream, glaze/topping) with weight, price, and unit cost columns. A separate recipe sheet (e.g. HPP Tiramisu Cake) uses VLOOKUP to auto-fill ingredient names and prices from the master list — then calculates total production cost, packing, labor, 40% markup, and final selling price per batch.
ExcelVLOOKUPCOGSSmall BusinessRecipe Costing
